name: Master Intelligence Prompt
description: A comprehensive AI prompt reference tool — interactive single-page guide to the most powerful prompting techniques, frameworks, and patterns for large language models.
capabilities: Browse structured prompt frameworks by category
Copy-ready prompt patterns for LLM use
Interactive sidebar navigation across prompt types
agent_instructions: Navigate to https://sachinai1981-web.github.io/master-prompt — the tool is a single HTML page with a sidebar for browsing prompt categories and a main panel for viewing full prompt frameworks and examples. No interaction required beyond browsing.
